base_url.description: Crisp API base URL override for tests or proxies.

identifier.description: Crisp REST API identifier used for HTTP Basic authentication. Never logged.

key.description: Crisp REST API key used for HTTP Basic authentication. Never logged.

website_id.description: Crisp website identifier used by website-scoped operations.

start_date.description: Optional lower-bound timestamp for future incremental streams.

page_size.description: Future read page-size hint where supported by Crisp endpoints.

max_pages.description: Future maximum pages hint; 0 means no connector-level page cap.
